_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: we observed significantly more rapid depletion of GFP-positive DNMT1 shRNA–expressing cells in PRC2-loss compared with PRC2-WT MPNST cell lines
details: PRC2-WT cell line used as control showing less sensitivity to DNMT1 perturbation compared to PRC2-loss lines
